item.name: Bridesmoogle
item.description:
What is a blushing bride without a dutiful bridesmoogle to scatter petals in her general vicinity?

Use item to acquire the bridesmoogle minion.
item.tooltip:
Wh-What have you done
with my bride!?
   - Vannes
item.specialactiondescription:
Increases ATK of all allies within range by 10.
Duration: 10s
